stocks.impact_theory: US DOJ charged SMCI co-founder and employees with smuggling $2.5B Nvidia AI chips to China using dummy servers. Economic implications: regulatory scrutiny on AI supply chain, potential bans/fines. Market psychology: fear of delisting or lost contracts amid US-China tensions. Historical parallels: Huawei ban caused 30% drop in 2019. Analogies: like Enron scandal eroding trust; or Boeing 737 issues grounding fleet.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Direct indictment leads to massive selloff (premarket -25%), X posts negative, web news heavy on plunge. Sentiment shift from AI hype to risk.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid; short opportunity +20-30% downside if probe expands.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Strong short +25% gains near-term; cover if company clears name.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Company distances from individuals, potential rebound; broader AI sector dip.

stocks.justification: Clear news catalyst with immediate price reaction and high volume.

stocks.impact_theory: Q3 FY26 earnings beat: EPS $5.25 vs $4.11 exp, revenue $24B beat, raised FY26 guidance $19.30-20.10. Implications: resilient demand despite economy/war. Psychology: relief rally post-cost cuts. Parallels: UPS 2022 beat. Analogies: athlete beating injury comeback; ship steady in storm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings surprise 27%, guidance up, premarket +9%. Positive X mentions.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Macro slowdown, oil costs from Iran war.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat with raised guidance.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran war escalation: Israel strikes, oil to $110+, Goldman warns record highs if disruptions. Implications: higher revenues/margins. Psychology: flight to energy safety. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine oil spike +50%. Analogies: gas station price gouge frenzy; storm hoarding fuel.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil surge sentiment on X/web, energy gainers like TTE +4%. War volatility favors majors.

stocks.impact_theory: Same Iran war oil surge. Implications: supply fears boost supermajors. Psychology: hedge against inflation. Parallels: Gulf War 1990. Analogies: betting on fire during drought; gold rush in chaos.
stocks.justification: Strong sector but shared with XOM.

stocks.impact_theory: Loser amid energy rally? X posts show -8.69%, perhaps China demand fears or commodity rotation. Implications: higher energy costs squeeze margins. Psychology: risk-off in metals. Parallels: 2020 COVID drop. Analogies: can crushed in recession; ice melting in heatwave.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment lists as top loser, no positive news.
